title: empty chat_state causes full Chat/query on every SSE StateChange event
description: When load_chats finds no chats (query.ids.is_empty()), it returns Ok(String::new()). chat_delta_sync returns Some(String::new()), which is written back into chat_state. chat_state remains empty. Every subsequent SSE StateChange containing Chat hits the is_empty() guard in chat_delta_sync and calls load_chats again (full Chat/query + potential Chat/get), rather than attempting delta sync. Trigger: account with 0 chats receives any SSE StateChange for Chat type. This is realistic for a newly-created account or after all chats are destroyed. The full-reload loop persists until at least one chat is created, at which point load_chats returns a non-empty state and normal delta sync resumes.
